headline: Backblaze Announces Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 03, 2026--Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) today announced that on May 28, 2026, it granted an equity inducement award to Anuj Kumar, the Company’s Chief Revenue Officer, as a material inducement to Mr. Kumar’s employment with the Company.
